title: v0.2 BEAD-11: CompassUI
description: firmware-overlay/src/modules/CompassModule/CompassUI.{h,cpp} per TDD section 14. wantUIFrame(), interceptingKeyboardInput(), drawFrame(), handleInputEvent(). Arrow geometry tip(0,-18)/wings(±9,-4)/tail(0,12) rotated by headingError using sinf/cosf (nRF52840 FPU). Blinks at 500ms when signal lost >90s. Screens: DISCOVERING node list, TRACKING compass, PAIR_INCOMING accept/reject, CALIBRATING sample counter, TRACKING_TREASURE with YOU'RE HERE at <15m. Long-press 800ms threshold. Acceptance: arrow tip up at heading error 0; rotates correctly at +/-45/90/180; blinks on signal lost; PAIR_INCOMING ACCEPT calls sendPairAccept; CALIBRATING sample count increments; TRACKING long-press releases UI frame; YOU'RE HERE at <15m. Depends on BEAD-8/9/10.

title: v0.2 BEAD-12: Integration patches (Modules.cpp + Screen.cpp)
description: patches/apply.py — patch_modules_cpp and patch_screen_cpp per TDD section 15. Read vendor/meshtastic-firmware/src/modules/Modules.cpp; choose anchors for include and setupModules() body; inject #include and new CompassModule(). Read src/graphics/Screen.cpp; find recent module's menu-entry pattern and copy it; inject Compass entry calling startDiscovery() + sendCapabilityQuery() + setFrames(). Acceptance: make build succeeds end-to-end; Compass appears in main menu on T114; selecting triggers DISCOVERING; stock Meshtastic functionality intact; two paired T114s exchange PAIR_REQUEST/ACCEPT/CONFIRM and enter TRACKING/TRACKED. Depends on BEAD-10/11.

title: v0.2 BEAD-10: CompassModule
description: firmware-overlay/src/modules/CompassModule/CompassModule.{h,cpp} per TDD section 13. Extends SinglePortModule (COMPASS_APP port) and OSThread. handleReceived() dispatches all 8 CompassMsgType values; runOnce() drives TRACKED position updates and TRACKING timeout detection; send helpers (sendCapabilityQuery, sendPairRequest, sendPairAccept, sendPairReject, sendSessionEnd). Static instance pointer. Acceptance: make build succeeds; module registers on COMPASS_APP port (other ports ignored); sendCapabilityQuery() emits broadcast hop_limit=0; injected mock PAIR_REQUEST → PAIR_INCOMING; TRACKED runOnce sends at configured interval; wantUIFrame() correct per state. Depends on BEAD-6/7/9.

title: v0.2 BEAD-9: CompassState
description: firmware-overlay/src/modules/CompassModule/CompassState.{h,cpp} per TDD section 12. 9-state FSM (IDLE/DISCOVERING/AWAITING_PAIR_ACCEPT/PAIR_INCOMING/TRACKING/TRACKED/TRACKING_TREASURE/SESSION_PAUSED/CALIBRATING). NVS namespace 'compass'. Treasure CRUD (max 5), calibration sample accumulation (min 50), Desire-side update suppression (5min stationary keepalive). Acceptance: make build succeeds; state transitions match diagram; saveTreasure/treasure round-trip through NVS across reboot; shouldSendUpdate suppression behavior correct; finishCalibration() returns false if <MIN_CAL_SAMPLES; cal-version mismatch returns zero offsets, no crash. Depends on BEAD-8.

title: v0.2 BEAD-8: CompassMath
description: firmware-overlay/src/modules/CompassModule/CompassMath.{h,cpp} — pure stateless functions per TDD section 11: bearing() forward azimuth, distanceMeters() Haversine, headingError() signed [-180,180]. Inputs are integer lat/lon × 1e7 matching GPS/protobuf convention. Acceptance: make build succeeds; spot-check bearing(0,0,1e7,0)≈0°, bearing(0,0,0,1e7)≈90°, distanceMeters(0,0,0,1e7)≈1111950m, headingError(350,10)≈20°, headingError(10,350)≈-20°. Depends on BEAD-2 (parallel with BEAD-5/6/7).

title: v0.2 BEAD-7: Magnetometer driver
description: firmware-overlay/src/modules/CompassModule/Magnetometer.{h,cpp} — QMC5883L driver on Wire1 (I2C 0x0D) per TDD section 10. begin() returning InitResult enum (OK/NOT_FOUND/INIT_FAILED); read() with DRDY polling; heading() applying calibration offsets; setCalibration/getCalibration. Init: chip ID 0xFF at reg 0x0D, write 0x01 to SETPERIOD, 0x1D to CTRL1, 0x40 to CTRL2. Acceptance: make build succeeds; on real hardware begin() returns OK with chip connected, NOT_FOUND with bus empty, INIT_FAILED with wrong chip ID; heading() smooth in [0,360); no blocking longer than DRDY_TIMEOUT_MS. Depends on BEAD-5.

title: v0.2 BEAD-6: Protobuf — compass.proto overlay + portnums patch
description: Write firmware-overlay/protobufs/meshtastic/compass.proto per TDD section 9 (CompassMsgType enum, CompassPacket message). Read vendor/meshtastic-firmware/protobufs/meshtastic/portnums.proto, confirm 300 unused, choose anchor (last enum member or trailing brace), implement patch_portnums_proto adding COMPASS_APP=300. Confirm exact upstream proto-regen script name (bin/regen-protos.sh candidate); update entrypoint.sh if different. Acceptance: make build runs to completion; meshtastic_PortNum_COMPASS_APP resolves to 300; meshtastic_CompassMsgType and meshtastic_CompassPacket accessible. Depends on BEAD-3.

title: v0.2 BEAD-5: Variant patch (variant.h + variant.cpp)
description: Read vendor/meshtastic-firmware/variants/nrf52840/heltec_mesh_node_t114/variant.h and variant.cpp. Choose stable anchor in variant.h, implement patch_variant_h injecting MAG_SDA/MAG_SCL/WIRE_INTERFACES_COUNT/WIRE1_INTERFACES_COUNT/PIN_WIRE1_SDA/PIN_WIRE1_SCL defines per TDD section 8. Verify whether BSP auto-creates Wire1 from PIN_WIRE1_* defines by inspecting other nRF52 variants with WIRE_INTERFACES_COUNT=2; if manual instantiation needed, implement patch_variant_cpp adding TwoWire Wire1(NRF_TWIM1, ...). Acceptance: make build succeeds; on real T114 with QMC5883L wired, Wire1.beginTransmission(0x0D) returns ACK. Depends on BEAD-3.

title: v0.2 BEAD-4: GitHub Actions (release + PR + drift)
description: Three workflows per TDD section 5: release.yml (push to main → CalVer prerelease with UF2), pr-build-t114.yml (per-PR prerelease + bot comment for QA), upstream-drift.yml (weekly cron → bump-pin PR if anchors apply, drift issue if not). Use docker/build-push-action@v6 with GHA cache. Acceptance: push to main produces tagged prerelease; PR touching build surface produces per-PR prerelease + comment; manual upstream-drift dispatch with current pin = noop. Depends on BEAD-2.

title: v0.2 BEAD-3: Patcher framework
description: patches/apply.py skeleton with MARKER, per-file function shape, --dry-run mode, loud-on-anchor-missing exit. Placeholder functions for all 5 patches that sys.exit('not yet implemented') — filled in by BEAD-5/6/12. Acceptance: --dry-run on clean checkout passes through placeholders; second run on already-patched checkout is no-op; missing anchor → non-zero exit naming (file, anchor). Depends on BEAD-1. See TDD section 6.2.

title: v0.2 BEAD-2: Docker pipeline
description: Multi-stage Dockerfile (toolchain → pinned firmware → builder) per TDD section 4.2, plus entrypoint.sh per section 4.3. At this stage firmware-overlay/ and patches/apply.py are still empty — pipeline must produce a stock firmware.uf2 from unmodified upstream. Acceptance: make build emits output/firmware.uf2 for stock Meshtastic; layer cache works (re-run < 30s); make shell drops into /firmware-src with pio on PATH. Depends on BEAD-1.

title: v0.2 BEAD-1: Repo scaffold + pin file
description: Foundation for the v0.2 patch-overlay pipeline. Add meshtastic-firmware-pin (one-line SHA), Makefile (setup/build/shell/clean/bump-pin), build.sh thin wrapper, .gitignore additions for vendor/ and output/, and empty firmware-overlay/, patches/, docker/ directories. Acceptance: make setup shallow-clones meshtastic/firmware into vendor/ at the pinned SHA; idempotent on re-run; vendor/ and output/ gitignored. See TDD section 17 BEAD-1.

title: BEAD-8: Integration — Modules.cpp and Screen.cpp wiring
description: Wire CompassModule into Meshtastic firmware. Two lines in src/modules/Modules.cpp: include header + new CompassModule() in setupModules(). One menu entry in src/graphics/Screen.cpp triggering sendCapabilityQuery() + setFrames(). Verify firmware compiles for heltec_mesh_node_t114 and all existing functionality is unaffected.
close_reason: Modules.cpp wired (include + new CompassModule()), MenuHandler.cpp gets Captain's Compass entry in homeBaseMenu, CompassModule gains drawFrame/handleInputEvent/notifyUI/Observable<UIFrameEvent*>/InputBroker observer. Build passes for heltec-mesh-node-t114: 90.6% flash, 44.6% RAM

title: BEAD-7: CompassUI — drawFrame, arrow rendering, input handling
description: Create src/modules/CompassModule/CompassUI.h and CompassUI.cpp. Implements wantUIFrame(), interceptingKeyboardInput(), drawFrame(), handleInputEvent(). Arrow geometry: tip(0,-18), wings(±9,-4), tail(0,12) rotated by headingError using sinf/cosf (nRF52840 has FPU). Blinks at 500ms when signal lost >90s. Screens: DISCOVERING node list, TRACKING compass, PAIR_INCOMING accept/reject, CALIBRATING sample counter, TRACKING_TREASURE with YOU'RE HERE at <15m.
close_reason: CompassUI.h and CompassUI.cpp written for 240x135 ST7789 TFT; arrow at (72,67) with rotatePoint+fillTriangle, dim/blink modes, all 9 state sub-renderers, 800ms long-press input handling

title: BEAD-6: CompassModule — SinglePortModule + OSThread packet handler
description: Create src/modules/CompassModule/CompassModule.h and CompassModule.cpp. Extends SinglePortModule (COMPASS_APP port) and OSThread. Implements handleReceived() dispatching all 8 CompassMsgType values, runOnce() scheduler driving TRACKED position updates and TRACKING timeout detection, and send helpers (sendCapabilityQuery, sendPairRequest, sendPairAccept, sendPairReject, sendSessionEnd). Static instance pointer.
close_reason: CompassModule.h and CompassModule.cpp written. SinglePortModule+OSThread, full packet dispatch for all 8 message types, sendCapabilityQuery/PairRequest/Accept/Reject/SessionEnd helpers, runOnce() driving calibration sample drain, pair timeout, tickTracked() position updates, tickTracking() session pause detection.

title: BEAD-5: CompassState — FSM and NVS persistence
description: Create src/modules/CompassModule/CompassState.h and CompassState.cpp. Full state machine with states: IDLE, DISCOVERING, AWAITING_PAIR_ACCEPT, PAIR_INCOMING, TRACKING, TRACKED, TRACKING_TREASURE, SESSION_PAUSED, CALIBRATING. NVS namespace 'compass'. Treasure CRUD (max 5), calibration sample accumulation (min 50 samples), Desire-side update suppression (5min stationary keepalive).
close_reason: CompassState.h and CompassState.cpp written. Full 9-state FSM, FSCom-based persistence for cal/treasures/settings under /compass/, Desire-side suppression via CompassMath::distanceMeters.

title: BEAD-3: Magnetometer driver — QMC5883L on Wire1
description: Create src/modules/CompassModule/Magnetometer.h and Magnetometer.cpp. QMC5883L driver on Wire1 (I2C addr 0x0D). Implement begin() returning InitResult enum (OK/NOT_FOUND/INIT_FAILED), read() with DRDY polling, heading() applying calibration offsets, setCalibration()/getCalibration(). Init sequence: verify chip ID 0xFF at reg 0x0D, write 0x01 to SETPERIOD, 0x1D to CTRL1, 0x40 to CTRL2.
close_reason: Magnetometer.h and Magnetometer.cpp written. QMC5883L driver on Wire1: begin() probes 0x0D, verifies chip ID 0xFF, runs init sequence. DRDY-gated burst read. heading() applies hard-iron offsets.

title: BEAD-4: CompassMath — bearing, distance, heading error
description: Create src/modules/CompassModule/CompassMath.h and CompassMath.cpp. Pure stateless functions: bearing(fromLat,fromLon,toLat,toLon) using forward azimuth formula, distanceMeters() using Haversine, headingError(currentHeading,bearing) returning signed [-180,180] degrees. Inputs are integer lat/lon x1e7 matching GPS and protobuf convention.
close_reason: CompassMath.h and CompassMath.cpp written in src/modules/CompassModule/. bearing(), distanceMeters(), headingError() implemented using Haversine and forward azimuth formulas.

title: BEAD-2: Protobuf definition — compass.proto + COMPASS_APP port
description: Add compass.proto to protobufs/meshtastic/ defining CompassMsgType enum (8 values) and CompassPacket message. Add COMPASS_APP=300 to portnums.proto. Run bin/generate-proto.sh to produce nanopb generated files. Commit generated compass.pb.h and compass.pb.c.
close_reason: compass.proto written, COMPASS_APP=300 added to portnums.proto, nanopb codegen produced compass.pb.h/.pb.cpp and updated portnums.pb.h. All files in firmware dir.

title: BEAD-1: Variant patch — Wire1 instantiation
description: variant.cpp for heltec_mesh_node_t114 does not instantiate Wire1 despite variant.h already defining WIRE_INTERFACES_COUNT=2 and PIN_WIRE1_SDA/SCL. Add TwoWire Wire1 instance to variant.cpp using NRF_TWIM1 peripheral. This is required for the QMC5883L magnetometer driver to function.
close_reason: BSP auto-creates Wire1 from PIN_WIRE1_* defines in variant.h — confirmed by inspecting all other nRF52 variants with WIRE_INTERFACES_COUNT=2. No variant.cpp change needed.

value: v0.1 of the TDD specified upstream firmware paths (src/modules/CompassModule/..., variants/...) without specifying how this repo physically relates to the upstream firmware tree. An agent implementing v0.1 cloned meshtastic/firmware on a separate machine, edited it in place, and reported success in beads — work evaporated when the clone was discarded. Eight beads (cdo,7si,fkf,q18,plu,61d,fvu,jul) closed claiming work that produced no output in this repo. v0.2 fixes this with: (1) firmware-overlay/ for new files, (2) patches/apply.py anchor-substitution patcher for modified files, (3) meshtastic-firmware-pin one-line SHA, (4) multi-stage Dockerfile baking the pinned upstream into a layer, (5) GitHub Actions release+PR+drift workflows. Build infrastructure (BEAD-1 through BEAD-4) ships before any C++. Prior art: github.com/soniccyclone/Meshtastic-Firmware-Friend-Finder-Edition.
